title: Honorary President of ECTI-CON 2022 Prof. Dr. Shahram Minaeİ
content:
Student

News

Details

Date: 10 July 2021

Honorary President of ECTI-CON 2022 Prof. Dr. Shahram Minaeİ

Dr. Shahram Minaei from the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Faculty of Engineering, will be the honorary chairperson of the conference, which will be held on 24-27 May 2022 in Huahin Beach, Prajuab Kirikhan, Thailand.

ECTI-CON has been held in many cities in Thailand for the last 18 years; It aims to provide an international platform to showcase advances in electrical engineering, electronics, computer, telecommunications, and information technology, new ideas and research. For participation in the conference and detailed information: https://www.ecti-con2022.org/
